title: Verify Remind Me functionality triggers correct event
description: Test that 'remind-me-clicked' event fires with correct page source when user sets reminder

steps.description: 1. Navigate to Trial Corner > Manage Trial
2. Click 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' toggle

expected_result: Event 'remind-me-clicked' fires with attribute 'page source' showing trial corner, pause pop-up, or cancel pop-up
